destinations.name: Rome

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but watch out for pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: The capital city, known for its historical landmarks like the Colosseum, Vatican City, and Pantheon.

Description.en: A hub of ancient history and modern culture, with rich traditions, art, and landmarks.
Description.zh: 古代历史与现代文化交融之地，拥有丰富的传统、艺术和地标。

history.zh: 古罗马帝国的心脏，建城可追溯至公元前753年，拥有斗兽场、万神殿等2000多年历史遗迹。

destinations.name: Florence

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but watch out for pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: A Renaissance city famous for its art, architecture, and historical significance.
destinations.Description: Home to world-class museums, including the Uffizi Gallery and Michelangelo?s David.

history.zh: 文艺复兴发源地，15-16世纪美第奇家族统治时期涌现大量艺术杰作，城市至今保留大量文艺复兴建筑。

destinations.name: Venice

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but watch out for pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: A unique city built on canals, known for its gondolas, Piazza San Marco, and Doge's Palace.

Description.en: An iconic city of water, renowned for romantic gondola rides and historic landmarks.
Description.zh: 著名的水城，以浪漫的贡多拉游船和历史地标闻名。

history.zh: 地中海威尼斯共和国繁盛之地，以水上城市著称，8世纪建城，历史上是东西方贸易的重要枢纽。

destinations.name: Milan

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but watch out for pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: A fashion capital known for its shopping, museums, and historical landmarks.

Description.en: A modern city with an ancient soul, featuring La Scala and the Duomo di Milano.
Description.zh: 一座古老灵魂的现代城市，拥有斯卡拉大剧院和米兰大教堂。

history.zh: 米兰古城，公元313年《米兰敕令》在此签署，宣布基督教合法地位，是欧洲历史重要转折点。

destinations.name: Naples

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: A vibrant city known for its delicious food, historical sites, and stunning coastline.

Description.en: Famous for pizza, Pompeii, and proximity to the Amalfi Coast.
Description.zh: 以披萨、庞贝古城和阿马尔菲海岸靠近而闻名。

history.zh: 意大利南部历史名城，公元前约600年由希腊人建立，曾是那不勒斯王国首都。

destinations.name: Cinque Terre
destinations.Safety: Generally safe, but be aware of crowds
destinations.Cultural Significance: A group of five colorful villages along the Italian Riviera, known for their stunning landscapes and hiking.
destinations.Description: Scenic coastal towns connected by breathtaking hiking trails and beaches.

destinations.name: Amalfi Coast
destinations.Safety: Generally safe, but be aware of crowds
destinations.Cultural Significance: A picturesque coastline with charming towns, stunning cliffs, and beautiful beaches.
destinations.Description: Famous for its steep cliffs, coastal towns, and lemon groves, offering breathtaking views of the Mediterranean.

destinations.name: Pisa

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: Famous for its Leaning Tower, but also offers other historical attractions and beautiful scenery.

Description.en: Known for the iconic Leaning Tower of Pisa, as well as its Romanesque architecture.
Description.zh: 以著名的比萨斜塔和罗马式建筑闻名。

history.zh: 意大利中世纪海港强国，鼎盛时期控制地中海贸易，拥有著名比萨斜塔等建筑遗产。

destinations.name: Lake Como
destinations.Cultural Significance: A beautiful lake surrounded by mountains, popular for boating, hiking, and relaxing.
destinations.Description: A luxury retreat for the elite, featuring serene waters and mountain landscapes.

destinations.name: Verona

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A romantic city known for its Shakespearean connection, Arena di Verona, and beautiful architecture.

Description.en: Famous for being the setting of "Romeo and Juliet" and its well-preserved Roman amphitheater.
Description.zh: 因作为《罗密欧与朱丽叶》的故事背景和保存完好的罗马圆形剧场而闻名。

history.zh: 意大利北部历史古城，公元前约89年由罗马人建立，以圆形竞技场闻名。

destinations.name: Barcelona

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but watch out for pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: Known for its Gaudi architecture, beautiful beaches, and vibrant nightlife.

Description.en: A city of stunning architecture, art, and vibrant culture. Famous for La Sagrada Familia and Park Gell.
Description.zh: A city of stunning architecture, art, and vibrant culture. Famous for La Sagrada Familia and Park Gell.

history.zh: 伊比利亚半岛古老港口城市，公元前233年建城，中世纪时期阿拉贡王国重要中心。

destinations.name: Madrid

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: The capital city, known for its world-class museums, lively atmosphere, and historical landmarks.

Description.en: Home to the Prado Museum, Royal Palace, and rich Spanish history.
Description.zh: 拥有普拉多博物馆、皇宫和丰富的西班牙历史。

history.zh: 西班牙首都，1561年定为首都，历史上是卡斯蒂利亚王国重镇，位于地理中心位置。

destinations.name: Seville

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: A historic city famous for its Moorish architecture, flamenco dancing, and vibrant festivals.

Description.en: The heart of Andalusian culture, with stunning landmarks like the Alc zar and the Seville Cathedral.
Description.zh: The heart of Andalusian culture, with stunning landmarks like the Alczar and the Seville Cathedral.

history.zh: 安达卢西亚历史名城，公元前1世纪罗马人建立，15世纪末航海时代重要港口。

destinations.name: Valencia

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: A coastal city known for its City of Arts and Sciences complex, beautiful beaches, and delicious cuisine.

Description.en: The birthplace of paella, with a mix of futuristic and historic architecture.
Description.zh: 海鲜饭的发源地，融合了未来主义和历史建筑。

history.zh: 西班牙东部历史古城，公元前138年由罗马人建立，曾是巴伦西亚王国中心。

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

Cultural Significance.en: A historic city famous for its Alhambra palace, Albaic¡n neighborhood, and vibrant nightlife.
Cultural Significance.zh: A historic city famous for its Alhambra palace, Albaicn neighborhood, and vibrant nightlife.

Description.en: Known for the magnificent Alhambra palace and stunning Moorish architecture.
Description.zh: 以壮丽的阿尔罕布拉宫和令人惊叹的摩尔式建筑闻名。

history.zh: 西班牙南部城市，摩尔人统治时期的最后据点，著名的阿尔罕布拉宫建于此。

destinations.name: M laga
destinations.Safety: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
destinations.Cultural Significance: A coastal city known for its beautiful beaches, historic center, and Picasso Museum.
destinations.Description: Birthplace of Picasso, featuring stunning beaches and a lively port.

destinations.name: Bilbao

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A modern city known for its Guggenheim Museum, vibrant atmosphere, and delicious pintxos.

Description.en: An industrial city turned cultural hotspot, home to the iconic Guggenheim Museum.
Description.zh: 工业城市转型为文化热点，拥有标志性的古根海姆博物馆。

history.zh: 西班牙北部工业城市，14世纪建城，历史上是航海和贸易重镇，古根海姆博物馆所在地。

destinations.name: Ibiza
destinations.Safety: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
destinations.Cultural Significance: A popular island destination known for its beaches, nightlife, and electronic music scene.
destinations.Description: World-famous for its beaches and nightclubs, a top destination for summer parties.

destinations.name: Majorca
destinations.Safety: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
destinations.Cultural Significance: A popular island destination known for its beautiful beaches, historical sites, and hiking trails.
destinations.Description: A serene island getaway, with picturesque beaches, mountains, and historic sites like the Palma Cathedral.

destinations.name: San Sebasti n
destinations.Cultural Significance: A coastal city known for its beautiful beaches, delicious pintxos, and vibrant atmosphere.
destinations.Description: Renowned for its food scene, with pristine beaches and picturesque Old Town streets.

destinations.name: Paris

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but watch out for pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: Home to iconic landmarks like the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and Notre-Dame Cathedral.

Description.en: A city of art, fashion, and culture, featuring world-famous landmarks and museums.
Description.zh: 艺术、时尚与文化之城，拥有世界著名的地标和博物馆。

history.zh: 法国首都，塞纳河畔千年古都，公元508年克洛维一世定都于此，大革命与艺术之城。

destinations.name: Nice
destinations.Safety: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
destinations.Cultural Significance: Known for its beaches, Mediterranean climate, and vibrant nightlife.
destinations.Description: A coastal gem with a beautiful Promenade des Anglais and stunning views of the French Riviera.

destinations.name: Marseille
destinations.Safety: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
destinations.Cultural Significance: The second-largest city in France, known for its historical Old Port, MuCEM museum, and Calanques park.
destinations.Description: A city rich in history and culture, with a vibrant port and stunning coastal landscapes.

destinations.name: Lyon

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: A culinary capital with renowned restaurants, historic architecture, and the confluence of two rivers.

Description.en: Famous for its gastronomy, vibrant old town, and Renaissance architecture.
Description.zh: 以美食、充满活力的老城和文艺复兴建筑闻名。

history.zh: 法国历史古城，公元前43年罗马人建立，曾是罗马高卢行省首都，高卢基督教中心。

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

Cultural Significance.en: A city famous for its wine production, historic center, and Cit du Vin museum.
Cultural Significance.zh: A city famous for its wine production, historic center, and Cit du Vin museum.

Description.en: Renowned for its vineyards and wine, as well as its charming 18th-century architecture.
Description.zh: 以其葡萄园、葡萄酒以及迷人的18世纪建筑闻名。

history.zh: 法国西南部历史港城，公元前6世纪希腊人建立，以葡萄酒产区闻名于世。

destinations.name: Strasbourg

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: A charming city with a medieval Old Town, Gothic cathedral, and Christmas markets.

Description.en: Located on the border with Germany, Strasbourg has a unique blend of French and German cultures.
Description.zh: 位于德国边境的斯特拉斯堡，融合了独特的法国和德国文化。

history.zh: 法国东部边境城市，莱茵河畔历史名城，欧盟议会所在地，曾是日耳曼帝国重要城市。

destinations.name: Cannes
destinations.Safety: Generally safe, but be aware of pickpockets
destinations.Cultural Significance: A glamorous coastal city known for its film festival, luxury shopping, and beautiful beaches.
destinations.Description: World-famous for the Cannes Film Festival, featuring stunning views of the Mediterranean Sea.

destinations.name: Mont Saint-Michel
destinations.Cultural Significance: A UNESCO World Heritage Site, famous for its abbey perched on a tidal island.
destinations.Description: A breathtaking medieval island commune with a stunning abbey and winding streets.

destinations.name: Loire Valley

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A region known for its stunning chateaux, vineyards, and picturesque landscapes.

Description.en: Known for its many chteaux and vineyards, a scenic getaway filled with history and beauty.
Description.zh: Known for its many chteaux and vineyards, a scenic getaway filled with history and beauty.

history.zh: 法国卢瓦尔河谷，文艺复兴时期法国王室所在地，分布着众多16-17世纪城堡。

destinations.name: French Alps
destinations.Cultural Significance: A mountainous region offering skiing, hiking, and other outdoor activities.
destinations.Description: A haven for outdoor enthusiasts, famous for its ski resorts and stunning alpine scenery.

destinations.name: Vienna

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: Known for its imperial palaces, classical music, and coffee houses.

Description.en: A cultural capital with imperial architecture, famous museums, and vibrant cafe culture.
Description.zh: 拥有帝国建筑、著名博物馆和充满活力的咖啡馆文化的文化之都。

history.zh: 奥地利首都，哈布斯堡王朝600年首都，帝国心脏，拥有美泉宫等辉煌建筑。

destinations.name: Salzburg

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: The birthplace of Mozart, famous for its Baroque architecture and music festivals.

Description.en: A city rich in history, music, and stunning Alpine surroundings, home to the Salzburg Festival.
Description.zh: 历史悠久，音乐氛围浓厚、阿尔卑斯山景致壮丽的城市，是萨尔茨堡音乐节的举办地。

history.zh: 奥地利历史古城，萨尔茨堡大主教驻地，盐贸易中心，拥有保存完好的巴洛克式老城。

destinations.name: Innsbruck

Best Time to Visit.zh: 冬季（十二月至三月）滑雪，夏季（六月至九月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A picturesque city in the Alps, known for skiing, hiking, and historic landmarks.

Description.en: A gateway to the Austrian Alps, Innsbruck offers both historical charm and outdoor adventure.
Description.zh: 通往奥地利阿尔卑斯山的门户，因斯布鲁克兼具历史魅力和户外探险。

history.zh: 奥地利蒂罗尔州首府，中世纪古老山城，著名的黄金屋顶建于15世纪，濒临阿尔卑斯山。

destinations.name: Hallstatt

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: Famous for its picturesque scenery, salt mines, and historic architecture.

Description.en: A UNESCO World Heritage Site, Hallstatt is known for its stunning lakeside setting and history.
Description.zh: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产地，以其壮丽的湖畔风光和历史闻名。

history.zh: 奥地利古老盐矿小镇，公元前800年开始采盐，境内有大量史前人类活动遗迹。

destinations.name: Graz

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: Known for its well-preserved Old Town, museums, and cultural festivals.

Description.en: A city blending modern culture with historic architecture, featuring a vibrant arts scene.
Description.zh: 融合现代文化与历史建筑的城市，拥有充满活力的艺术景观。

history.zh: 奥地利施泰尔马克州首府，13世纪建城，马克西米利安一世皇帝曾在此举行婚礼。

destinations.name: Zell am See

Best Time to Visit.zh: 冬季（十二月至三月）滑雪，夏季（六月至九月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A popular resort town known for its lakeside location and outdoor activities.

Description.en: Zell am See offers breathtaking views of the Alps and a range of recreational activities.
Description.zh: 泽尔恩湖提供阿尔卑斯山的壮丽景色和各种休闲活动。

history.zh: 奥地利阿尔卑斯山湖区温泉小镇，历史上为盐贸易中转站，紧邻湖泊与雪山。

destinations.name: Wachau Valley
destinations.Cultural Significance: Famous for its vineyards, historic towns, and scenic beauty along the Danube River.
destinations.Description: A UNESCO World Heritage Site, Wachau Valley is known for its wine production and castles.

destinations.name: Bregenz
destinations.Cultural Significance: Located on Lake Constance, known for its festivals and beautiful scenery.

Description.en: Bregenz is renowned for its lakeside festivals, including the famous Bregenz Festival on the lake.
Description.zh: 布雷根茨以其湖畔节日闻名，包括著名的湖上布雷根茨音乐节。

history.zh: 奥地利福拉尔贝格州首府，康斯坦茨湖畔古老城市，罗马时代已有定居点。

destinations.name: Vienna Woods
destinations.Cultural Significance: A forested area near Vienna, popular for hiking and enjoying the outdoors.
destinations.Description: Vienna Woods offers a natural escape from the city, with scenic hiking and biking trails.

destinations.name: Bad Gastein

Best Time to Visit.zh: 冬季（十二月至三月）滑雪，夏季（六月至九月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A spa town known for its hot springs, skiing, and outdoor activities.

Description.en: Bad Gastein is famous for its thermal baths, offering relaxation and wellness in the Alps.
Description.zh: 巴特加斯泰因以其温泉浴场闻名，在阿尔卑斯山提供放松和健康体验。

history.zh: 奥地利温泉疗养胜地，19世纪成为贵族社交中心，以矿泉疗养闻名。

destinations.name: Brussels

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

Safety.en: Generally safe, but watch out for pickpockets
Safety.zh: 总体安全，但需注意扒手

destinations.Cultural Significance: The capital of Belgium and the EU, known for its Grand Place, Manneken Pis, and Atomium.

Description.en: A political and cultural hub with impressive architecture, museums, and a vibrant arts scene.
Description.zh: 政治文化中心，拥有令人印象深刻的建筑、博物馆和充满活力的艺术景观。

history.zh: 比利时首都，欧盟总部所在地，9世纪建城，中世纪为低地国家重要商业中心。

destinations.name: Bruges

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A medieval city famous for its canals, cobblestone streets, and historic architecture.

Description.en: A UNESCO World Heritage Site, known as the "Venice of the North" for its romantic canals and bridges.
Description.zh: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产地，被称为'北方威尼斯'，拥有浪漫的运河和桥梁。

history.zh: 比利时中世纪繁荣港城，14世纪欧洲金融中心，以哥特式建筑和运河闻名。

destinations.name: Ghent

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A historic city known for its medieval architecture, art museums, and vibrant cultural life.

Description.en: Ghent is known for its rich history, including the famous Ghent Altarpiece and stunning medieval towers.
Description.zh: 根特以其丰富的历史闻名，包括著名的根特祭坛画和壮丽的中世纪塔楼。

history.zh: 比利时佛兰芒历史名城，历史上与布鲁日并列为佛兰芒三大城市之一，拥有圣巴夫大教堂。

destinations.name: Antwerp

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A port city known for its diamond industry, fashion, and Renaissance architecture.

Description.en: Antwerp boasts a lively arts scene, historic squares, and is a global hub for the diamond trade.
Description.zh: 安特卫普拥有充满活力的艺术景观、历史广场，是全球钻石贸易中心。

history.zh: 比利时安特卫普，16世纪欧洲钻石贸易中心，第二次世界大战后重建的繁华港口城市。

destinations.name: Leuven

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A university city known for its historic center, breweries, and student life.

Description.en: Leuven is home to one of the oldest universities in Europe and is known for its lively atmosphere.
Description.zh: 鲁汶是欧洲最古老大学之一的所在地，以其活跃的氛围闻名。

history.zh: 比利时古老大学城，1425年建立天主教鲁汶大学，是比利时巧克力与啤酒产地。

destinations.name: Dinant

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A picturesque town along the Meuse River, known for its citadel, saxophones, and scenic beauty.

Description.en: Dinant is the birthplace of Adolphe Sax, inventor of the saxophone, and features striking riverside views.
Description.zh: 迪纳尔是萨克斯管发明者阿道夫·萨克斯的出生地，拥有令人惊叹的河畔景色。

destinations.name: Spa

Description.zh: 斯帕镇以健康水疗的概念命名，以其治愈之水闻名。

history.zh: 比利时著名温泉疗养城镇，16世纪起成为欧洲贵族理疗胜地，SPA一词发源地。

destinations.name: Ostend

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

destinations.Cultural Significance: A coastal city known for its beaches, seafood, and vibrant seafront promenade.

Description.en: Ostend offers a combination of seaside relaxation, culture, and lively entertainment on the Belgian coast.
Description.zh: 奥斯坦德在比利时海岸提供海滨休闲、文化和活泼娱乐的结合。

history.zh: 比利时北海岸港城，17世纪发展起来的海滨度假胜地，第二次世界大战重要港口。

destinations.name: Namur

Best Time to Visit.zh: 春季（四月至五月）或秋季（九月至十月）

history.zh: 比利时那慕尔省首府，默兹河与桑布尔河交汇处，中世纪要塞城市。

destinations.name: Copenhagen

destinations.Cultural Significance: Known for its colorful architecture, charming canals, and vibrant culture.

Description.zh: Denmark's capital, famous for Nyhavn, the Little Mermaid statue, and a lively caf scene.

history.zh: 丹麦首都，10世纪由维京人建立，15世纪成为丹麦中心，美人鱼雕像所在地。

destinations.name: Rothenburg ob der Tauber
